<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Lima-City](https://www.lima-city.de) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/limacity/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "limacity"
  dnsCredentials:
    # LIMACITY_API_KEY: The API key
    apiKey: ""
    # LIMACITY_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # LIMACITY_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 80)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # LIMACITY_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 480)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # LIMACITY_SEQUENCE_INTERVAL: Time between sequential requests in seconds (Default: 90)
    sequenceInterval: ""
    # LIMACITY_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 60)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
